case_title: GEORGE BELL VS. INDIGENOUS GLOBAL DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION, A UTAH

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT INDIGENOUS GLOBAL DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION, A UTAH CORPORATION

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELL, GEORGE AS TO DEFENDANT LEONARD, DENI AKA LEONARD PELTIER, OFCR OF INDGENOUS GLOBAL DEVELOPMENT OEX HEARING SET FOR MAR-07-2006 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 610

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELL, GEORGE AS TO DEFENDANT INDIGENOUS GLOBAL DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION, A UTAH CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
